name: Zimbabwe Greens
recipeIngredient: 5 Green onions, sliced (green and white parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely shred the collard greens, discarding tough stems.
2. Place shredded greens in a saucepan with water. Bring to a boil and cook, stirring occasionally, just until greens are crunchy-tender (don't overcook).
3. Drain the greens, reserving the cooking liquid.
4. Return greens to medium heat; add chopped tomato and sliced green onions. Heat through, stirring frequently.
5. Thinly mix peanut butter with ¾ cup of reserved cooking liquid.
6. Add the mixture to vegetables and stir constantly until greens have a creamy consistency. If the mixture seems too thick, add more reserved liquid.
7. Taste and adjust salt as needed.
8. Serves 4.
- PER SERVING: 110 calories, 6 g protein, 9 g carbohydrate, 6 g fat (1 g saturated), 0 mg cholesterol, 85 mg sodium, 4 g fiber.
From an article by Karola Saekel in the San Francisco Chronicle, 8/18/93.
